calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Paul Perdue, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Luis So, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Powell Yang.
Amended default entered on March 11, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on March 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Luis So and against the Defaulted Defendant: Powell Yang as follows:

Damages/Principal - $57,444.00.
Costs - $455.00, for a total of $57,899.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Continued To Apr-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
